zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 他昨天对我笑了一下，他是不是喜欢我？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 姐妹，醒醒，他对所有人都这样好吗。别太delulu了。

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 好吧...但我就是控制不住啊！

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 哈哈没关系，delulu is the solulu嘛！

en.speaker: A
en.text: He smiled at me yesterday, does he like me?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Girl, wake up. He smiles at everyone. Don't be so delulu.

en.speaker: A
en.text: I know... but I can't help it!

en.speaker: B
en.text: Haha it's fine, delulu is the solulu!

definitions.en: Internet slang for 'delusional' — having unrealistic beliefs or fantasies, often about relationships or life goals
definitions.zh: 网络俚语，意为「妄想/不切实际」——对感情或人生目标抱有幻想

definitions.en: Playfully describes confident optimism that's obviously unrealistic but self-aware
definitions.zh: 戏谑地形容那种「知道不现实但就是要信」的乐观心态

examples.en: I'm so delulu thinking he'll actually text me back.
examples.zh: 我真是delulu，居然觉得他会回我消息。

examples.en: My delulu era: believing I'll wake up rich one day.
examples.zh: 我的delulu时代：相信某天醒来就会变有钱。

examples.en: Delulu is the solulu — sometimes you gotta fake it till you make it.
examples.zh: Delulu is the solulu（妄想是解药）——有时候就得假装到自己都信。

examples.en: Bestie, you're being delulu if you think he's into you after one date.
examples.zh: 姐妹，相亲一次你就觉得人家看上你了，你可真delulu。

collocations.zh: 妄想时代（自我调侃某段沉迷幻想的时期）
妄想世界（类似la-la land的幻想空间）
妄想是解药（暗示自信+幻想能带来好运）

fun_fact: 2023年TikTok爆火，2025年被收入Cambridge Dictionary。同年澳大利亚总理在国会演讲中使用「delulu with no solulu」批评反对派！
